testcase.name: test_lms_setup_step_in_workflow

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'status' in {'completed': True, 'completed_date': '2026-02-10T02:45:32.175361+00:00', 'data': {'file_url': '', 'notes': '', 'students_list': [{'class': '5', 'name': 'TEST_Student1', 'password': 'pass123', 'username': 'test_user1'}, {'class': '6', 'name': 'TEST_Student2', 'password': 'pass456', 'username': 'test_user2'}], 'students_uploaded': 2, ...}, 'description': 'Student credentials uploaded to LMS', ...}
